typeDescriptions.increase: More push-ups, more reading, more meditation...
typeDescriptions.decrease: Less smoking, less sugar, less screen time...
typeDescriptions.maintain: Keep a steady dose each day

highImpact.title: High-impact habits
highImpact.description: Science-backed habits with the greatest proven benefits.

trackingMode.title: Tracking mode
trackingMode.timerHint: Great for: planking, breaks, time limits...

entryMode.title: Entry mode
entryMode.hint: How values are recorded throughout the day
entryMode.replaceDesc: Each entry replaces the previous one
entryMode.cumulativeDesc: Entries add up throughout the day
entryMode.cumulativeHint: Great for: glasses of water, snacks, cigarettes...

weeklyAggregation.hint: How we count your weekly progress
weeklyAggregation.countDaysDesc: Count days when you reach your dose
weeklyAggregation.countDaysHint: E.g., 3 evenings going to bed early this week
weeklyAggregation.sumUnitsDesc: Add up units for the whole week

intentions.stepSubtitle: Defining when and where increases your chances of success 2-3 times.

trigger.label: After what?
trigger.help: Choose a trigger that's already part of your routine.

location.label: Where?
location.help: A specific place helps automate the habit.

habitStacking.title: Link to an existing habit
habitStacking.subtitle: Habit stacking increases success rate by 64%.
habitStacking.label: After which habit?
habitStacking.help: Chain this new habit with one you already do.
habitStacking.noHabits: Create another habit first to link them together.

identity.stepTitle: Who do you want to become?
identity.stepSubtitle: Lasting change comes from identity change, not just behavior.
identity.inputHelp: Describe the person you want to become through this habit.

firstCheckIn.title: First victory?
firstCheckIn.subtitle: Did you already do something today?

recalibration.title: Recalibrate {{habitName}}?
recalibration.subtitle: Ease back in gently
recalibration.description: Your target has moved while you were away. To ease back in, we can adjust your starting point.
recalibration.confirmMessage: Your starting value for {{habitName}} will change from {{oldValue}} to {{newValue}} {{unit}}.

welcome.title: Welcome
welcome.description:
Doucement helps you improve your habits gradually, without guilt.

🔒 Your data stays on your device. No account, no cloud, no tracking.

dose.title: Today's dose
dose.description:
Forget big scary goals. Just focus on today.

Your daily target adjusts automatically as you progress: +1%, +2%... compound effect does the rest.

effort.title: Every effort counts
effort.description: Doing a little is still doing something. 70% counts as a win.

data.title: Your data
data.exportSuccess: Export complete. Your data is in the downloaded file.
data.cleanupArchivedDesc: Remove entries from habits archived for more than 6 months.
data.cleanupArchivedNone: Nothing to clean up. No habits archived for more than 6 months.

install.title: Install the app
install.intro: 📱 Doucement can be installed on your phone like a real app, without going through a store.

android.title: 🤖 On Android (Chrome)
android.step3: Select "Install app" or "Add to Home screen"

install.benefit: ✨ Once installed, the app works offline and opens instantly.

backup.title: 💡 Back up your data regularly!
backup.warning: Your data is only stored on this device.
backup.explanation: If you switch phones, reinstall the app, or clear browser cache, you could lose it.
backup.recommendation: Recommendation: Export your data once a week and keep the file somewhere safe.
backup.text1: Your data is stored only on this device. If you switch phones, reinstall the app, or clear browser cache, you could lose it.
backup.text2: Recommendation: Export your data once a week and keep the file somewhere safe (cloud, email, computer).

danger.title: Sensitive zone
danger.warning: This action will delete all your data. It cannot be undone.

reset.warning: This action will delete all your data. It cannot be undone.

about.title: About
about.description: Doucement is an app designed to help you improve your habits gradually, without guilt.
about.privacy: Your data stays on your device. No information is collected or transmitted.
about.debugTapHint: Tap 7 times to enable debug mode.

import.title: Import data
import.text: Importing will replace all your current data with the file's data.
import.warning: Importing will replace all your current data with the file's data.
import.mergeWarning: The file's data will be merged with your current data. In case of conflicts, the most recent version is kept.
import.irreversible: This action cannot be undone. Consider exporting your current data first if you want to keep it.
import.modeReplaceDesc: Replace all your data with the file's data
import.modeMergeDesc: Combine the file's data with yours

reset.title: Reset application
reset.text: You are about to delete all your habits and history.

messages.exportSuccess: Export complete. Your data is in the downloaded file.
messages.importSuccess: Import successful. Your data has been restored.
messages.importError: This file doesn't seem compatible. Make sure it's a Doucement export.

morning: Mornings are made for first steps
evening: The day is coming to an end
There's still a bit of time left

messages: You're back. Let's ease into it.
You're here. No pressure, let's continue.
Welcome back. Every day is a fresh start.
You came back. That's already a win.

habitNeglected.title: It's been a while
habitNeglected.subtitle: No entries for this habit yet. Pick it up whenever you're ready.
habitNeglected.subtitle_plural: No entries for {{days}} days. Pick it up whenever you're ready.
habitNeglected.encouragement: No worries. Pick up whenever you're ready.

plannedPause.dialogDescription: During a pause, this habit won't appear in your daily dose and won't affect your stats.

simpleTracking.transitionSuggestion: You've been using this habit for 30 days! Want to switch to detailed tracking?

intentionalFriction.delayMessage: Take a few seconds to think...
intentionalFriction.preLogQuestion: How are you feeling right now?

noHabits.title: No habits yet
noHabits.description: Create your first habit to see your weekly review.

positive: Consistency pays off. Keep it up.
Solid week. The compound effect is working.
average: A mixed week, but you're still here.
A few active days. That's better than none.
The week wasn't perfect. That's okay. Let's keep going.
difficult: Tough week? It happens to everyone.
Not your best week, but it's just one week.
What matters isn't falling — it's getting back up.

reflection.title: Weekly reflection
reflection.question: What worked well this week?
reflection.placeholder: Note what helped you stick to your habits...

patternAnalysis.noDataYet: Not enough data yet to identify patterns.

slowDown.title: Suggestion
slowDown.message: Your progress seems to be stalling. How about slowing down a bit?

keepGoing.title: Keep it up!
keepGoing.message: You're on a roll. Maintain this pace.

overperform.title: Impressive!
overperform.message: You regularly exceed your doses. Ready to speed up?

absenceRecalibration.title: Shall we recalibrate together?
welcomeMessages: Life got in the way. That's okay.
You returned. That's already a win.
absenceRecalibration.explanation: Your target has moved while you were away. To ease back in, we can adjust your starting point.
successMessages: Got it. Your new target starts today.
Recalibration done. What matters is getting back on track.
absenceRecalibration.skipMessage: Alright. Your target stays at {{dose}} {{unit}}. You can always adjust later.

compoundEffect.noProgressYet: Your progress will build over time.

double.title: Doubled!
double.message: You've doubled since you started. Impressive.

triple.title: Tripled!
triple.message: Three times what you started with. Incredible progress.

half.title: Cut in half!
half.message: You've cut it in half. Solid progress.

quarter.title: Down to a quarter!
quarter.message: A quarter of where you started. Remarkable.

fiftyPercent.title: +50% reached!
fiftyPercent.message: You've grown by half since you started.

hundredPercent.title: +100% reached!
hundredPercent.message: You've doubled your capacity. Compound effect in action.

milestones.weeks: It's been {{count}} weeks since you started. Look how far you've come.
milestones.days: {{count}} days on this habit. You're not the same person anymore.
milestones.months: {{count}} months. The compound effect is working.
milestones.monthsFirst: One month. Then two. Then three. That's compound effect.

25.title: Quarter of the way there!
messages: You've passed the first quarter of the way. Great start!
25% is the beginning of a great journey. Keep it up!

50.title: Halfway there!
messages: You're halfway to your target. You should be proud.
Half the journey is done. The momentum is there!

75.title: Three quarters done!
messages: Only 25% left to reach your target. You're almost there!
75% complete. The finish line is in sight!

100.title: Target reached!
messages: You did it! You've reached your target.
Mission accomplished. You should be proud of what you've achieved.

completed: Another day on the right track.
partial: You made progress today. That's what matters.
Not 100%, but you didn't give up.
What matters is you did something.
exceeded: You went above and beyond. Not required, but impressive.
You did more than planned. The momentum is there.
Extra effort! Remember: consistency beats intensity.
noActivity: A break is sometimes progress too.

habitCreated: Habit created. Your first target starts tomorrow.
All set. Your first target will be ready tomorrow.
habitModified: Got it. Your new progression starts now.
habitArchived: Habit archived. Its history is preserved.
Habit paused. You can reactivate it whenever you want.
goalReached: It's done. You should be proud.

emptyState.title: Everything starts with one habit
emptyState.subtitle: Create your first habit to begin your progress.

restart.title: Fresh start
restart.encouragement: Every fresh start is a victory.
restart.newValueHint: Your progression will restart from this value
restart.reasonPlaceholder: E.g., Getting back after a break
restart.reasonHint: Note why you're making this fresh start
restart.confirmMessage: Your starting value will change from {{oldValue}} to {{newValue}} {{unit}}. Your history will be preserved.

noHabits.title: No statistics yet
noHabits.message: Create your first habit to start seeing your statistics.

notEnoughData.title: Keep going for a few more days
notEnoughData.message: You're at {{days}} day. Come back in a few days to see your statistics.
notEnoughData.message_plural: You're at {{days}} days. Come back in a few days to see your statistics.

goalReached.message: Target reached! You should be proud.

almostThere.message: The finish is close! Keep up this momentum.

threeQuarters.message: Three quarters of the way there. You're almost there!

halfWay.message: Halfway there. You're on the right track.

quarterWay.message: Great start! Each day brings you closer to your target.

positiveProgress.message: You're moving in the right direction. Keep it up.

stagnation.message: Every small step counts. What matters is to keep going.

morning.title: Morning reminder
morning.hint: A reminder to start your day
morning.body: Your daily dose is waiting for you ☀️

evening.title: Evening reminder
evening.hint: A reminder if you haven't logged today
evening.body: You haven't logged your day yet

timeOfDaySelector.title: Time of day
timeOfDaySelector.hint: Optional. When do you prefer to do this habit?

habitCard.firstDay: This is the start of your journey!
habitCard.closeToTarget: Only {{remaining}} to go before your target of {{target}} {{unit}}!

sleep-regular-bedtime.name: Regular bedtime
sleep-regular-bedtime.description: Go to bed at the same time each night
sleep-regular-bedtime.scienceHighlight: Improving sleep reduces depression by 63% and anxiety by 51%.

sleep-screen-before-bed.name: Reduce screens before bed
sleep-screen-before-bed.scienceHighlight: 8% of premature deaths are attributed to poor sleep habits.

movement-daily-walk.name: Daily walk
movement-daily-walk.scienceHighlight: Every additional 1000 steps reduces mortality by 15%.

movement-pushups.name: Push-ups or squats
movement-pushups.scienceHighlight: 15 minutes of exercise per day reduces mortality by 20%.

movement-walk-after-meal.name: Post-meal walk
movement-walk-after-meal.scienceHighlight: Walking also improves sleep and reduces medication needs.

screen-social-media.name: Reduce social media
screen-social-media.scienceHighlight: One week without social media reduces anxiety by 16% and depression by 25%.

screen-before-sleep.name: No screens 1h before bed
screen-before-sleep.scienceHighlight: Reducing screen time to <3h/week significantly improves well-being.

mindfulness-meditation.name: Guided meditation
mindfulness-meditation.scienceHighlight: Meditation shows moderate effects on anxiety and depression.

mindfulness-breathing.name: Breathing exercises
mindfulness-breathing.scienceHighlight: Even short sessions reduce cortisol reactivity.

reading-daily.name: Daily reading
reading-daily.scienceHighlight: 6 minutes of reading reduces stress by 68%.

reading-before-bed.name: Reading before bed
reading-before-bed.description: Read instead of screens at night
reading-before-bed.scienceHighlight: Readers live on average 2 years longer.

substance-cigarettes.name: Reduce cigarettes
substance-cigarettes.scienceHighlight: Gradual reduction has better success rates than quitting cold turkey.

substance-alcohol.name: Reduce alcohol
substance-alcohol.scienceHighlight: The WHO recommends a harm reduction approach.

hydration-water.name: Drink more water
hydration-water.scienceHighlight: Good hydration improves cognitive performance by 10-15%.

finance-savings.name: Save weekly
finance-savings.scienceHighlight: Automatic saving reduces financial stress by 40%.

learning-language.name: Learn a language
learning-language.scienceHighlight: Learning a language delays cognitive decline by 4-5 years.

food-restaurant.name: Fewer restaurants
food-restaurant.scienceHighlight: Cooking at home reduces chronic disease risk by 28%.

food-mealprep.name: Meal prep
food-mealprep.scienceHighlight: Meal prep improves nutritional quality by 50%.

social-quality-time.name: Quality time
social-quality-time.scienceHighlight: Social relationships increase life expectancy by 50%.

productivity-deep-work.name: Deep work
productivity-deep-work.scienceHighlight: 90 minutes of deep work equals 4 hours of fragmented work.

gratitude-journal.name: Gratitude journal
gratitude-journal.scienceHighlight: Gratitude improves well-being by 25% in 10 weeks.

exportReminder.message: It's been a while — want to back up your data? A regular export keeps your progress safe.

dose.title: Today's dose
dose.text: Instead of showing you a daunting long-term goal, Doucement shows you just one thing: what to do today. Your dose adjusts automatically based on the pace you've chosen.

progression.title: Gentle progression
progression.text: Doucement increases or decreases your dose in small increments. This approach relies on the compound effect: small, consistent progress leads to remarkable results.

partial.title: Partial effort counts
partial.text: Doing 70% of your dose isn't a failure — it's a win. What matters is staying on a positive trajectory.

create.title: Create a habit
create.text: Start with just one habit. Choose between a simple habit (done/not done) or a progressive one (adjusting dose). For progressive habits, set your starting dose, your pace, and optionally a final goal.

today.title: The Today screen
today.text: This is your main screen. It shows your habits for the day with their target dose. A simple action lets you record your progress.

checkIn.title: Check-in
checkIn.text: Each day, take a few seconds to log what you've done. If you did less than planned, just enter the approximate percentage.

missedDay.title: If you miss a day
missedDay.text: No big deal. No broken streaks, no guilt trips. The next day, you simply pick up where you left off.

simple.title: Simple mode
simple.text: For binary habits (done/not done). A single button is all you need.

detailed.title: Detailed mode
detailed.text: For quantifiable habits. Enter a precise number using +/− buttons.

counter.title: Counter mode
counter.text: For counting throughout the day. Each tap on + increments the counter.

stopwatch.title: Stopwatch mode
stopwatch.text: For tracking time spent. Great for meditation or reading.

timer.title: Timer mode
timer.text: For timed exercises with a countdown.

slider.title: Slider mode
slider.text: For subjective scales with a dynamic emoji (mood, energy, pain level).

weekly.title: Weekly habits
weekly.text: For habits that don't need daily tracking. The goal is spread across the week.

stacking.title: Habit stacking
stacking.text: Anchor a new habit to an existing one: "After my coffee, I meditate for 5 minutes."

pauses.title: Planned pauses
pauses.text: Temporarily suspend a habit without affecting your statistics.

celebrations.title: Celebrations
celebrations.text: Doucement celebrates your milestones (25%, 50%, 75%, 100%) with a confetti animation.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.text: No data ever leaves your device. No server, no account, no tracking.

export.title: Export and backup
export.text: Export your data as JSON from Settings to back it up or transfer it to another device.

tips.title: Tips
tips.startSmall: Start with a dose you're confident you can handle, even on your worst days.
tips.fewHabits: Focus on 1 to 3 habits at most to maximize your chances of success.
tips.trustProcess: The first few days, progress may seem tiny. Trust the process.
